key_insight: MobileNetV3 can classify pipeline weld defects with very high accuracy while remaining lightweight enough for on-device inspection.
engineering_relevance: This makes automated weld inspection more practical for field deployment on mobile or handheld tools where speed, power, and memory are constrained.
method: Preprocess and augment noisy RGB weld images.
Train and compare MobileNetV3 Small and Large for multi-class defect classification.
Evaluate on two practical datasets with different capture conditions.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports 99.99% accuracy on AI5083 and improved performance on the smaller, uncontrolled PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
watch_item: The very small PWDID dataset and strong dependence on image quality mean real-world robustness should be confirmed across broader lighting, camera, and site conditions.
paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
